mapper.insert:
select seq_alarm_no.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO ALARM ( ALM_ID , ALM_MSG , ALM_DTL , ALM_URL , ALM_SNDR_TM , ALM_DEL_YN , EMP_ID , ALM_TYPE , ALM_SNDR_ICON ) VALUES (#{almId}, #{almMsg}, #{almDtl}, #{almUrl}, SYSDATE, 'N', #{empId}, #{almType}, #{almSndrIcon})

select seq_alarm_no.nextval from dual
INSERT INTO ALARM_RECEIVE (ALM_RCVR_NO , ALM_ID , EMP_ID , ALM_RCVR_TM , ALM_YN , ALM_DEL_YN) VALUES (#{almRcvrNo}, #{almId}, #{empId}, SYSDATE, 'N', 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, ar.* FROM ALARM a JOIN ALARM_RECEIVE ar ON ar.ALM_ID = a.ALM_ID where ar.EMP_ID=#{empId} and ar.ALM_DEL_YN='N' and ar.ALM_YN='N' order by a.ALM_SNDR_TM desc

SELECT a.* , ar.* , E.EMP_PROFILE , FN_GET_AVATAR_NM(A.EMP_ID) AS AVT_SAVE_NM FROM ALARM a JOIN ALARM_RECEIVE ar ON ar.ALM_ID = a.ALM_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON A.EMP_ID=E.EMP_ID
where ar.EMP_ID=#{empId} and ar.ALM_DEL_YN='N' order by a.ALM_SNDR_TM desc
mapper.update: UPDATE ALARM_RECEIVE SET ALM_YN='Y' , ALM_YN_TM=sysdate WHERE EMP_ID=#{empId} AND ALM_YN='N'
UPDATE ALARM_RECEIVE SET ALM_DEL_YN='Y' WHERE EMP_ID=#{empId} AND ALM_DEL_YN='N'

UPDATE ALARM_RECEIVE SET ALM_YN = 'Y', ALM_YN_TM = SYSDATE WHERE ALM_YN = 'N' AND EMP_ID = #{empId} AND ALM_ID IN ( SELECT ALM_ID FROM ALARM WHERE (UPPER(ALM_TYPE) = '채팅' OR UPPER(ALM_TYPE) = 'CHAT') AND REPLACE(ALM_URL, ' ', '') LIKE '%' || #{chatRmNo} || '%' )
UPDATE ALARM_RECEIVE SET ALM_YN = 'Y', ALM_YN_TM = SYSDATE WHERE ALM_RCVR_NO = #{almNo}
